name: Tuning Magician
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>調</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>律</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>術</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>師</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If you have 2 "Magician" cards in your Pendulum Zones, while this card is in your hand or Graveyard: You can Special Summon this card, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use this effect of "Tuning Magician" once per turn. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: Your opponent gains 400 LP, then you take 400 damage.
mnst_eff: If you have 2 "Magician" cards in your Pendulum Zones, while this card is in your hand or Graveyard: You can Special Summon this card, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use this effect of "Tuning Magician" once per turn. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: Your opponent gains 400 LP, then you take 400 damage.
eff: If you have 2 "Magician" cards in your Pendulum Zones, while this card is in your hand or Graveyard: You can Special Summon this card, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use this effect of "Tuning Magician" once per turn. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: Your opponent gains 400 LP, then you take 400 damage.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
banished: Banishes itself when it leaves the field
